message:
fix(orc): improve ORC column name and type parsing

- Add getColumnName() and getColumnType() methods to OrcReader
- Fix struct type detection by checking for subtypes and fieldNames
- Parse repeated fieldNames from struct types for column name extraction
- Fix num_columns to exclude root struct (data columns start at 1)
- Update OrcTable to use safe accessor methods

The ORC footer parsing now correctly identifies struct types even when
the kind field has unexpected values, by detecting the presence of
subtypes and fieldNames fields which are struct-specific.
